creator: pmc@citylink.dinoex.sub.org
text:
(In reply to Cullum Smith from comment #15)
Thank You, Cullum. Let's hope we can motivate the maintainer to change this.

But what You're talking about seems to be a bigger issue. You say postgres 16 no longer /build/ with Heimdal in Base. Does this also mean that it does no longer /run/ with it?
Because, hacking the deploy machine is one thing, changing the Kerberos in production is yet another.

I had currently no intention to follow the switch to 16. But if this becomes an issue, one must see to it, before some application might suddenly need 16.
I checked the release notes, and only found sparse mention of some credential delegation, but no details. And I do not yet see the possible usecase for such.

Do You have some source of input for me?
